source: %% Frontier Event Wrapper %% kitsoki viz --flowchart --detail states flowchart LR Start(["Start"]):::input subgraph SG___exit__fled["__exit__fled — Exit: fled"] direction LR ST___exit__fled[/"__exit__fled"/]:::room end subgraph SG___exit__member_lost["__exit__member_lost — Exit: member_lost"] direction LR ST___exit__member_lost[/"__exit__member_lost"/]:::room end subgraph SG___exit__resolved["__exit__resolved — Exit: resolved"] direction LR ST___exit__resolved[/"__exit__resolved"/]:::room end subgraph SG_bandits["phase 1 · bandits"] direction LR ST_bandits_encounter[/"bandits.encounter"/]:::room end subgraph SG_scouting["phase 0 · scouting — Scout the trail ahead before pressing into the unknown."] direction LR ST_scouting[/"scouting"/]:::room end Start --> ST_scouting ST_bandits_encounter -- "bandits__flee" --> ST___exit__fled ST_bandits_encounter -- "bandits__fight (default)" --> ST___exit__member_lost ST_bandits_encounter -- "bandits__fight [world.bandits__party…]" --> ST___exit__resolved ST_bandits_encounter -- "bandits__pay [world.bandits__party…]" --> ST___exit__resolved ST_bandits_encounter -- "bandits__look" --> ST_bandits_encounter ST_bandits_encounter -- "bandits__pay (default)" --> ST_bandits_encounter ST_scouting -- "proceed" --> ST_bandits ST_scouting -- "look" --> ST_scouting ST_scouting -- "scout" --> ST_scouting classDef input fill:#eef,stroke:#446,stroke-width:1.5px classDef room fill:#fff,stroke:#357,stroke-width:1.5px classDef work fill:#f7f7fa,stroke:#888 classDef llm fill:#f0e6ff,stroke:#6a3eb5,stroke-width:2px,color:#3a2270 classDef shell fill:#fef6e4,stroke:#a85,stroke-width:1.5px classDef store fill:#eef5fb,stroke:#369,stroke-width:1px classDef cache fill:#fff6e0,stroke:#a86,stroke-width:1.5px classDef err fill:#fff5f5,stroke:#c66,stroke-width:1px,stroke-dasharray:4 3 classDef next fill:#e8f5e9,stroke:#272,stroke-width:1.5px classDef note fill:#fffbe6,stroke:#a90,stroke-width:1px,stroke-dasharray:2 2,color:#553
